operational_knowledge_units.title: OpcConfiguration table stores OPC connection parameters
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the OpcConfiguration table stores the connection parameters required for the software to bridge the gap to the OPC.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "The OpcConfiguration table stores the connection parameters required for the software to bridge the gap to the OPC."
Slide section/title references OPC Comms Database.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the OPC Comms Database, the OpcConfiguration table stores the connection parameters required for the software to bridge to the OPC.

operational_knowledge_units.title: OpcTags table defines tags subscribed on startup
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that OpcTags stores the tags that will be subscribed to on startup.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "OpcTags stores the tags that on startup will be subscribed to."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The OpcTags table in the OPC Comms Database stores the tags that are subscribed to on startup.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Software subscribes to stored OPC tags at startup
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates a startup behavior where the software subscribes to the tags stored in OpcTags.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "OpcTags stores the tags that on startup will be subscribed to."
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: On startup, the software subscribes to OPC tags stored in the OpcTags table.
